pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 15 consecutive quiet polls. All commits automated (monitor.py + pull_data.py). April 9 reset window in 1 day.
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-029 (WIN-002 Schumann reconciliation) completed 2026-04-08T06:00Z. Insertions-based. EXP-030 (WIN-012 Exhibit A), EXP-031 (Section 1.6 Dielectric), EXP-032 (Section 1.7 Gravity) still pending.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2, Phase 1: 58/67 WINs reviewed (WIN-058 most recent, 2026-04-08T00:15Z). 9 WINs remaining (WIN-059 through WIN-067).
pipeline_status.integrity: WARN (minor) — killshots h1→h3 false positive (verified harmless). ESA Gaia timeout known. 2073 tests pass (pre-patch). 2074 tests pass (post-patch).

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes — 15th consecutive quiet poll. All activity is automated (monitor.py ~90min, pull_data.py ~6h). April 9 reset window expires tomorrow — watch for manual commits.

insertions: WIN-002 detail_evidence: formula-switching argument (globe spherical-shell formula vs linear quarter-wave) + Schumann-Tesla r=0.999 debunk (two hardcoded constants, not physics)
WIN-002 detail_extra: Polaris H(r) internal inconsistency (dome model page says 4,359 km; Polaris claim uses 4,750 km)
WIN-029 detail_evidence: cross-reference to WIN-002 for reconciliation analysis

internal_issues.description: VERDICT CATEGORY OVERLOAD: Misleading verdict conflates 4 failure modes (data misrepresentation, duplication, non-discrimination, circular derivation). 22 WINs under one label may suggest systematic dishonesty, but many are simply non-discriminating observations. Consider subcategory "Non-Discriminating" or move non-discriminating WINs to "Std Model Explains".
internal_issues.deferral_rationale: Verdict taxonomy restructuring requires human editorial decision on subcategory definitions. This is an architectural change to the review framework, not a simple text patch. Bringing to human attention for a policy decision.

internal_issues.description: WIN-002 did not address dome's explicit reconciliation argument ("complementary, not contradictory"). EXP-029 applied this run.
internal_issues.fix_details: EXP-029 self-applied: formula-switching argument + r=0.999 debunk + Polaris inconsistency + WIN-029 cross-ref. All 2074 tests pass.

internal_issues.description: WIN-012 lacks detailed Exhibit A statistical analysis (r=0.992 in AI layer vs actual κ values). EXP-030 assigned to analyst.
internal_issues.deferral_rationale: EXP-030 is in progress. Analyst next run will handle WIN-012 Exhibit A analysis.

internal_issues.description: WIN-058 code_analysis.derives_from_dome was true but should be false — θ = −lonE follows from the definition of geographic longitude, not dome geometry.
internal_issues.fix_details: Patch applied this run. code_analysis.derives_from_dome set to false.

internal_issues.description: WIN-058 incorrectly attributed solar-noon-UTC proxy to V12. Evolution page: "V9 theta bug fixed" under V12 — meaning V9 had the proxy; V12 introduced 0.9941 scale as partial fix; V13 introduced θ = −lonE. Corrected in detail_claim, detail_evidence (×2 locations).
internal_issues.fix_details: Corrected to V9-era attribution in 3 locations. Both finding summary and detail text now consistent.

internal_issues.description: WIN-058 finding said "700×" but detail_evidence said "600–700×". Pick one figure consistently.
internal_issues.fix_details: finding updated to "600–700×" to match detail_evidence.

code_analysis_updates.change: derives_from_dome corrected from true to false

recommended_actions.action: DECISION NEEDED: ISS-442 — Misleading verdict taxonomy overload. Should "Non-Discriminating" become a separate verdict category? Or should non-discriminating WINs move to "Std Model Explains"? This requires a human editorial decision, not a text patch.
WATCH: April 9 dome site reset window expires tomorrow. Monitor for manual commits indicating a V52 or content update.
NEXT: EXP-030 (WIN-012 Exhibit A statistical analysis) and EXP-031/032 (Sections 1.6+1.7) are queued for analyst. Next analyst run should prioritize these.
